project_type: Book translation project - PDF text extraction, translation to Uzbek, PDF generation
test_framework: Manual verification - checking translation quality and PDF output
verification_instructions: 1. Run the PDF generation script. 2. Open the output PDF and verify it contains all chapters translated. 3. Verify Uzbek text renders correctly with proper Unicode support.
snapshot_or_generated_files: The final translated PDF: 'Shaxmat - bolalar o'yini (O'zbek tilida tarjima).pdf'
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access available. Python 3.11 available. Libraries already installed: pdfplumber, fpdf2, PyPDF2.
contribution_requirements: Complete translation of all 26 chapters + preface + afterword. Multi-stage quality review required.
key_patterns: The source PDF has 288 pages, 261 with extractable text. 26 chapters covering chess teaching techniques for children. Contains diagrams (referenced as 'Diagram X.Y') which will be noted as placeholders in the translation.
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/gg/Chess Is Childs Play Teaching Techniques That Work (Laura Sherman, Bill Kilpatrick) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).pdf
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/gg/ - root directory with source PDF and extracted text file
